project_type: Vanilla JavaScript financial reporting web app (SPA) using Firebase/Firestore
build_system: None - static files deployed to Netlify
verification_instructions: Run node -c on all .js files to validate syntax. Manual verification of logic correctness through code review.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static web files
environment_constraints: No build system, no test framework, no Docker. Validation is limited to syntax checking with node -c.
key_patterns: All app logic in single keuangan-app.js file (12000+ lines). Firebase/Firestore data layer in keuangan-firebase.js via KDB object. Approval flow: Draft -> Pending Layer 1/2/3 -> Approved Final. On Approved Final, buatJurnalDariPermohonan/buatJurnalDariDanaMasuk creates a jurnal entry. edit functions save back to permohonan/danamasuk but do NOT update linked jurnal entries. delete functions do NOT clean up linked jurnal entries. getFinancialData() calculates saldo from saldo_awal + all jurnal lines.
directory_structure: Root: index.html (main page), keuangan-app.js (ALL app logic ~12000 lines), keuangan-firebase.js (Firebase/Firestore KDB layer), netlify.toml, netlify/functions/gemini.js (serverless)
